HOW ZIA WORKS FOR YOU
Rules.

Set the boundaries and let Zia handle the rest. These rules decide what Autopilot does on its own, what it checks with you first, and what it never touches.

Autopilot is on
Following 9 active rules across your apps. Turn off to pause every automated action.
Autonomy level
For each kind of action, decide whether Zia acts on its own, holds it for review, or asks you first.
Tidying up
Just organizing your inbox. No one else is affected, and nothing gets sent.
Like: filing, labeling, summarizing, snoozing
Replying for you
Sends messages in your name. You can still fix or undo it.
Like: “got it, thanks,” confirmations, quick follow-ups
Making commitments
Agrees to things or shares with others. Hard to take back once it’s done.
Like: accepting meetings, sharing files, replying to outside people
Whatever Zia does on its own — and anything that changed because of it — lands in your Autopilot feed and your Today brief.
Zia never acts on
By default Zia works across your Mail, Calendar, and Notes. Anything you add here is left completely untouched — Zia won’t read it, triage it, or act on it.
From no-reply or automated senders
Newsletters & Promotions category
When I'm only on CC
From my family
Zia understood
Anything matching this list is left completely alone — Zia won’t triage it, act on it, or notify you. Everything else is handled normally, following your Autonomy level and Automations above.
Automations
When something happens, Zia takes an action — or checks with you first. Tap any rule to turn it on or off.
When a meeting needs scheduling, Zia finds a slot and sends the invite
Coordinates over Calendar & Cliq, avoids your focus time
When a routine email arrives, Zia drafts a reply for review
Newsletters & receipts are filed automatically
When an email contains a task, Zia adds it to ToDo
With a due date pulled from the message
When a thread goes quiet, Zia sends a follow-up after
Only for threads where you sent the last message
Check with me first before emailing people outside the company
Zia drafts it, then waits for your go-ahead
Check with me first when something mentions money over
Zia prepares everything, but never sends without you
Check with me first before messaging my manager or leadership
Zia drafts it, then waits for your go-ahead
